name: Cajun Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Iceberg lettuce, torn into 1-inch pieces
1 cup Romaine lettuce, torn into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chicken, lemon juice, cayenne pepper, garlic powder, white pepper, basil, and thyme in a medium-sized mixing bowl.
2. Mix well.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
4. Combine lettuces, green pepper, cauliflower, mushrooms, and carrots in a large salad bowl.
5. Toss to distribute evenly.
6. Add chicken (including marinade).
7. Sprinkle with sunflower seeds.
